description_long: This kiosk is a rustic, wooden structure with a prominent gabled roof made of dark, overlapping shingles. The front features a large notice board area, partially covered by the roof's overhang, with several weathered papers and notes pinned to its surface. The frame is constructed from thick, sturdy wooden beams, and a horizontal support bar runs across the lower front. The rear of the kiosk is plain, showing only the wooden backing without any signage or decoration. The sides reveal the depth of the roof and the solid construction of the support posts. The overall appearance suggests a community notice board or information kiosk commonly found in parks or small urban squares.
description: A rustic wooden kiosk with a gabled shingle roof and a front-facing notice board covered by an overhang. The structure is sturdy, with visible weathered papers and a plain wooden rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the notice board with pinned papers, a protective roof overhang, and a horizontal support bar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and pitch of the gabled roof and the thickness of the wooden support post.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden backing with no signage or decoration, and the full width of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the roof's overhang and the solid vertical post.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs and handwritten notes pinned to the front notice board; visible text includes 'HELP' and other indistinct writing.
attribute_roof_design: Gabled roof with dark wooden shingles and a significant overhang on all sides.
